name: Sweet-And-Sour Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Pineapple Chunks, Drained and Cut Into Halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the navy beans thoroughly and place in a 3½-quart slow cooker.
2. Add the water and soak overnight.
3. The next day, cover the slow cooker and cook on the high setting for 3 hours or until tender.
4. Drain the beans and set aside.
5. Fry the bacon in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat until crisp. Remove the bacon and drain on paper towels.
6. Sauté the onion and garlic in the bacon drippings until tender.
7. Stir in the tomato sauce, chili sauce, molasses, brown sugar, salt, pepper, and Tabasco Sauce.
8. Cook over high heat until the mixture comes to a boil. Remove from the heat.
9. Combine the beans, tomato sauce mixture, pineapple, pickles, and olives in the slow cooker. Blend well.
10. Cover and cook on the high setting for 3½ to 4½ hours.
